commit.author: Hermes Agent
commit.subject: Update PRD-02 and SPECS.md with SOPs, Token Management, and new file locations

analysis_result.analysis: This commit strengthens the project's operational foundation by formalizing SOPs and security protocols for token management in the core documentation. However, the failure to update the plan or changelog files makes it difficult to track this progress against the broader project roadmap.
analysis_result.suggested_message: docs: define SOPs and token management protocols in PRD-02 and SPECS.md
